raw_consumer_statement: Original purchase from vendor XXXX for a microsdcard total- {$180.00} Product was momentarily lost in shipment-I requested a dispute with Citibank ( my credit card ) since the product was missing * Product eventually was delivered and I requested the dispute be removed by Citibank which they did * Product turned out to be defective and/or counterfeit. XXXX issued an XXXX, I returned it, they acknowledged receipt issue a credit memo to my credit card company Citibank XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX I have repeatedly contacted Citibank requesting the credit {$180.00} be applied. They have not done so and keep telling me it is under investigation, 7-10 days. I never hear back from Citibank, and have to repeatedly call and I get the same answer, with no credit applied to my account.
